steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The notes say musicians prize Stradivarius violins for their sound quality. The student wants to emphasize why musicians value these instruments.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: discusses the naming convention for Stradivarius violins rather than why musicians prize them. ✗
  • Choice B — 'renowned for their sound quality among musicians': directly states the reason musicians value the violins, matching the note exactly. ✓
  • Choice C: provides biographical information about Stradivari rather than explaining why the violins are prized. ✗
  • Choice D: also focuses on biographical details and does not address why musicians value the violins. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
